nasb.text: And he said, “Fill four pitchers with water and pour it on the burnt offering and on the wood.” And he said, “Do it a second time,” and they did it a second time. And he said, “Do it a third time,” and they did it a third time.

esv.text: And he said, “Do it a second time.” And they did it a second time. And he said, “Do it a third time.” And they did it a third time.

cnv.text: 又說：“倒第二次。”他們就倒第二次；又說：“倒第三次。”他們就倒第三次。

ccb.text: 以利亚吩咐他们再倒一次，他们又倒了一次。以利亚又吩咐他们倒第三次，他们就倒了第三次。
